text: Jabse usne kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gayi hoon, mere sar mein aisa bhari-pan rehne laga hai jaise koi lohe ki hatheli dabba rahi ho. Divorcee hone ka stigma aur bacchon ki zimmedari toh pehle hi thaka deti thi, par ab ye chest tightness sone nahi deti. Main rona nahi chahti kyunki mere yahan sikhaya gaya hai ki 'mard nahi rota' aur ab mujhe hi ghar ka mard banna hai, isliye bas gas ki dawai kha leti hoon.

Uski baatein sunkar ki shehar ne mujhe badal diya, mere pet mein ajeeb si jalan aur acidity shuru ho gayi hai jo kisi dawa se nahi ja rahi. Samaj mein izzat bachane aur bacchon ke future ka pressure kandhon mein itni jakdan deta hai ki hila nahi jata. Main emotionally kamzor nahi dikh sakti kyunki 'log kya kahenge', isliye bas thakan ka bahana banakar aankhein band kar leti hoon.

Partner ke tanno ke baad se mera dum ghutne laga hai aur hatheliyon mein hamesha paseena aur poore sharir mein kampann hoti rehti hai. Community exclusion ka darr aur akelapan itna badh gaya hai ki ab saans lene mein bhi takleef hoti hai. Rona toh kamzori ki nishani hai, isliye main bas doctor ko bolti hoon ki shayad viral bukhar ki wajah se sharir toot raha hai.

Jab usne badalne ki baat ki, meri raaton ki neend ud gayi aur gale mein hamesha kuch atka sa mehsus hota hai. Single mother hone ke naate mujhe sakht banna padta hai kyunki 'mard nahi rota' wala asool ab mujh par laagu hota hai, par ye peeth ka dard peecha nahi chhod raha. Main dukh chhupakar kaam karti hoon, par dimaag ki nasein phatne lagti hain jaise koi shiddat ka migraine ho.

Uske ye kehne ke baad ki main badal gayi hoon, meri aankhon mein hamesha jalan rehti hai aur badan mein ajeeb si suiyan chubhti hain. Divorce stigma ki wajah se pehle hi bohot ghutan thi, ab ye dil ki dhadkan achanak badh jaati hai jaise koi heart ki takleef ho. Main ro kar apna dard nahi baant sakti kyunki parivaar ki 'izzat' ka sawal hai, isliye bas migraine ki painkiller kha kar din nikaal rahi hoon.
